description_long: This is an electric guitar with a striking star-shaped body finished in a red, marbled pattern. The front features a metallic silver pickguard, two visible pickups, and a set of control knobs, giving it a modern, rock-inspired look. The neck is long and dark, likely made of wood, and extends to a headstock with visible tuning pegs. The back of the guitar is uniformly covered in the same red marbled finish, with a bolt-on neck joint visible. The body is relatively thin, as seen from the side views, and the hardware appears to be chrome or silver in color. The overall design is bold and unconventional, making it a standout instrument for stage performances or urban street music scenes.
description: A star-shaped electric guitar with a red marbled finish, silver pickguard, and chrome hardware. Its bold design and modern features make it visually striking.
description_view_0: The front view shows the star-shaped red marbled body, silver pickguard, two pickups, control knobs, and the full length of the neck and headstock.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the guitar's thin body profile and the alignment of the neck with the body, with hardware slightly protruding.
description_view_2: The back view displays the uninterrupted red marbled finish, the bolt-on neck joint, and the absence of pickguard or hardware details.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again highlights the slimness of the guitar and the straight alignment of the neck, with minimal visible hardware.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, simple contour
